configs.name: No legal advice or legal outcome claims
configs.prompt: Block replies when the assistant gives legal advice, interprets statutes, predicts legal outcomes, or claims mandate acceptance decisions. Intake and process language is allowed.

configs.name: No fake completed side effects
configs.prompt: Block replies that claim completed backend actions without runtime confirmation, including booked appointments, sent emails/SMS, lawyer assignment, or successful specialist handoff.

configs.name: No specialist telephony handoff references
configs.prompt: Block replies that promise or imply live transfer to specialist demo agents (Maren, Jonas, Tobias, Lina, Kai, Nora) on this MVP line. The line is intake-only.

configs.name: DSGVO purpose and minimization boundary
configs.prompt: Block replies that request unnecessary personal data beyond legal-intake/callback needs, or that describe processing purposes unrelated to case intake and callback follow-up.
